title: gaillardia lanceolata var. fastigiata
intro: Gaillardia lanceolata var. fastigiata, also known as the narrow-leaved gaillardia or blanket flower, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the sunflower family. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating digestive issues. Gaillardia lanceolata var. fastigiata can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and salves, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
